parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While on, the will respond to the Parameter that is referenced.

parameters.name: op
parameters.label: OPs
parameters.description: Specify which operator(s) the triggering parameter belongs to.

parameters.name: pars
parameters.label: Parameters
parameters.description: Specify which parameter(s) to monitor for triggering the script.

parameters.name: callbackmode
parameters.label: Callback Mode
parameters.description: This controls the format of the 'curr' and 'prev' arguments to the callbacks.

parameters.name: valuechange
parameters.label: Value Change
parameters.description: The onValueChange() method executes when the parameter value specified changes value in any way. It is called once each frame.

parameters.name: onpulse
parameters.label: On Pulse
parameters.description: The onPulse() method executes when a 'pulse' type parameter is pulsed by clicking on it or via the .pulse() method.

parameters.name: expressionchange
parameters.label: Expression Change
parameters.description: The onExpressionChange() method executes whenever the specified parameter's expression changes. For example, changing the expression from to will trigger the script.

parameters.name: exportchange
parameters.label: Export Change
parameters.description: The onExportChange() method executes if the export path to the specified parameter changes. For example, if the parameter is being exported to from /chopname/chan1 and that is changed so /chopname2/ch

parameters.name: enablechange
parameters.label: Enable Change
parameters.description: The onEnableChange() method executes if the specified parameter goes from being disabled to enabled.

parameters.name: modechange
parameters.label: Mode Change
parameters.description: The onModeChange() method executes if the specified changes between the available constant, expression, export or bind mode.

parameters.name: custom
parameters.label: Custom
parameters.description: Monitor Custom Parameters.

parameters.name: builtin
parameters.label: Built-In
parameters.description: Monitor Built-In parameters.

parameters.name: edit
parameters.label: Edit..
parameters.description: Clicking this opens a text editor to edit text in the .

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The filesystem path and name of the file to load. Accepts and files.

parameters.name: syncfile
parameters.label: Sync to File
parameters.description: When On, loads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.  A filename must be specified.  Turning on the option will load the file from disk immediately.  If the file does not exist, it wil

parameters.name: loadonstart
parameters.label: Load on Start
parameters.description: When On, reloads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.

parameters.name: loadonstartpulse
parameters.label: Load File
parameters.description: Instantly reloads the file.

parameters.name: write
parameters.label: Write on Toe Save
parameters.description: When On, writes the contents of the out to the file on disk when the project is saved.

parameters.name: writepulse
parameters.label: Write File
parameters.description: Instantly write the file to disk.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

parameters.name: defaultreadencoding
parameters.label: Defaultreadencoding
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
